name: Fiendsmith Kyrie
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>刻まれし魔の憐歌</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>デモンスミス・キリエ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: This turn, your LIGHT Fiend monsters cannot be destroyed by battle, also any battle damage you take becomes halved. You can banish this card from your GY; Fusion Summon 1 "Fiendsmith" Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters you control, and/or monsters in your Spell & Trap Zones that are equipped to a "Fiendsmith" monster as an Equip Spell, as material. You can only use this effect of "Fiendsmith Kyrie" once per turn.
eff: This turn, your LIGHT Fiend monsters cannot be destroyed by battle, also any battle damage you take becomes halved. You can banish this card from your GY; Fusion Summon 1 "Fiendsmith" Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters you control, and/or monsters in your Spell & Trap Zones that are equipped to a "Fiendsmith" monster as an Equip Spell, as material. You can only use this effect of "Fiendsmith Kyrie" once per turn.

action: Sends from your field to your Graveyard
Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
Uses Spell Cards as Fusion Materials
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
attack: Prevents other cards being destroyed by battle
